summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ShowSpot BookMyShow clone. Successfully tested user registration, login, chatbot AI integration, theme toggle, movie browsing, and partial booking flow. Payment page loading issue identified.

integration_issues.issue: Payment page fails to load after seat selection, shows loading spinner indefinitely

passed_tests: Homepage loads with movie cards and proper branding
User registration with controlled input fields
Chatbot opens via pointerdown event dispatch
Chatbot sends messages and receives AI responses with movie recommendations
Movie card navigation to detail pages
Show time selection and navigation to seat selection
Seat selection functionality (can select multiple seats)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix payment page loading issue - investigate why payment page shows loading spinner indefinitely after proceeding from seat selection. Check authentication state persistence and booking context data flow.
success_percentage: Frontend: 85% (9/10 major flows working, payment page loading blocked)
